## GUJARAT ENERGY TRANSMISSION CORPORATION LIMITED

Regd. Office: Sardar Patel Vidyut Bhavan; Race Course; Vadodara: 390007 (CIN) U401006J1999SGC036018

Website: WW getcogujarat com

Email: aceproc getco@gebmail com

Ref. No.

Dt.2 /08/2025

## LETTER OF INTENT

## By Email

To, Mls Rajesh Power Services Limited , 380/3, Siddhi House; Opp. Lal Bungalow; BIH Sasuji Dining Hall; Off. C. G. Road; Navrangpura, Ahmedabad-380006. mitesh@rajeshpower.com

Sub:Supply, Erection;   Testing and commissioning work of 11KV Shunt reactor; Equipment & Material at GETCO Sls to overcome Over voltage in LTIHT network of Discom.

Ref: (1) Tender No. CE(P&C)IContractsISSIE-312/11KV ReactorIS&E opened on 04-07-25.

- (3) Your offer letter No.-Nil (On line submission).
- (2) Technical Bid & Price Bid opened on 30-07-2025 & 01-08-2025 respectively.
- (4) This office Mail for Negotiation dtd: 08-08-2025.
- (5) Your Revised offer L No. RPSLIGETCOIE -312/2183/25-26 Dt: 11-08-25

Dear Sir,

With reference to above referred offer and subsequent correspondences; Corporations intends to place order with your firm MIs Rajesh Power Services Limited. Ahmedabad for the Supply,  Erection;   Testing and commissioning work of 11KV Shunt reactor, Equipment & Material at GETCO Sls to overcome Over voltage in LTIHT network of Discom on firm price basis.

| Sr. No   | Total end cost including Description GST 18.00 % in Rs.                                                                                                       | Total end cost including Description GST 18.00 % in Rs.       | Completion period                              |
|----------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------------|
|          | Supply Erection; Testing and commissioning work of 11KV Shunt reactor, Equipment & Material at GETCO Sls to overcome Over voltage in LTIHT network of Discom. | Rs. 1,82,37,846.11 ie. (1,54,55,801.79 27,82,044.32, 189 GST) | 09 (Nine) months from the date of Commencement |

You have to accept all the terms and conditions of the tender without any deviation. Kindly send your acceptance within seven days of issuance of this letter.

Thanking you,

Yours faithfully,

Gujarat Transmission Corporation Ltd. Vadodara

For and on behalf of

<!-- image -->

(VK Patel Additional Chief Engineer (Procurement & Contract)
